get.description: Retrieve paginated list of exceptions for a specific project. Supports filtering by issue ID and pagination.
Retrieve a specific exception by its ID within the project scope.
Returns time series data for number of exceptions per day. Supports optional from/to date filters (ISO strings).
Retrieves a paginated list of issues for a specific project. Supports filtering, sorting, and pagination.
get.summary: Get paginated list of project issues

get.description: Retrieves detailed information about a specific issue by its ID.

put.description: Updates the status of a specific issue. Valid status values include open, in_progress, resolved, and closed.
Updates the severity level of a specific issue. Valid severity values include low, medium, high, and critical.
